content: We can frame the sequential, goal-directed decision-making of an autonomous agentic AI as a dynamic principal component analysis over high-dimensional state-action spaces, where the agent automatically identifies and prioritizes the top few uncorrelated "principal directions" of action that bring it closest to its end goal, pruning away all low-impact irrelevant alternatives. This framework enables agentic AI to operate efficiently in open-ended, high-complexity environments without continuous human oversight, by aligning its inherent autonomy with PCA's dimensionality reduction logic.
